warning Opened via File Protocol (file://). Data sharing (adding products, inquiry submissions) between the Admin Portal and the live site will NOT work because browsers isolate file origins. Please run the local server (npm run dev) and open the site via http://localhost:5173 instead.

Trusted Supply for Your Business

Navayuga Traders bridge the gap between global growers and local commerce. From high-volume wholesale contracts to precise retail inventory, we ensure your shelves remain stocked with premium agricultural products.

Why Partner With Us?
